name: Google Workspace Containment
creator: 3c05c4d5-37f0-43a8-a16d-9cf0091794af
description: This block allows the playbook to update Google Workspace Directory user accounts as part of containment or response actions, supporting account management and security controls.

steps.name: Tools_Set Context Value
steps.description: The action sets a key and value in a specific context (alert or case)

steps.name: Condition
steps.description: This condition determines the progress of the playbook. Conditions are built based on cases data (cases, alerts, vents, entities and environment properties) as-well as data that comes back from previous playbook steps.

steps.name: MultiChoiceQuestion
steps.description: This step conditions the progress of the playbook according to a question the analyst has to answer manually, would be used most for questions which can't be answered automatically

parameters.name: Question
parameters.value: Do you want to update the user(eg : force password update)?

steps.name: Condition
steps.description: This condition determines the progress of the playbook. Conditions are built based on cases data (cases, alerts, vents, entities and environment properties) as-well as data that comes back from previous playbook steps.

steps.name: Siemplify_Set Scope Context Value
steps.description: Action sets a value for a key specified that is stored in the Siemplify database. Available scopes to get context values for: Alert, Case, Global. Action is not working on Siemplify entities. Note: Key Name parameter is case insensitive.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Context Scope":"Alert","Key Name":"REMEDIATION","Key Value":"[Alert.REMEDIATION]<sep> No users to update."}

steps.name: Siemplify_Set Scope Context Value
steps.description: Action sets a value for a key specified that is stored in the Siemplify database. Available scopes to get context values for: Alert, Case, Global. Action is not working on Siemplify entities. Note: Key Name parameter is case insensitive.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Context Scope":"Alert","Key Name":"REMEDIATION","Key Value":"[Alert.REMEDIATION]<sep>During the investigation of the alert it was decided to update the user."}

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Customer ID":"","Domain":"","Manager Email":"","Return only Admin Accounts?":false,"Return only Delegated Admin Accounts?":false,"Return only Suspended Users?":false,"Org Unit Path":"","Department":"","Record Limit":"20","Custom Query Parameter":"","Return only users without 2fa?":false,"Email Addresses":"[Filter Principal User.SelectedEntities]"}

steps.name: Entity Selection
steps.description: Creates a group of entities that can be used in other actions. Use conditions to fine tune the group.

steps.name: Siemplify_Set Scope Context Value
steps.description: Action sets a value for a key specified that is stored in the Siemplify database. Available scopes to get context values for: Alert, Case, Global. Action is not working on Siemplify entities. Note: Key Name parameter is case insensitive.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Context Scope":"Alert","Key Name":"REMEDIATION","Key Value":"[Alert.REMEDIATION]<sep>During the investigation of the alert, it was decided not to update the user."}
